mapper.select: SELECT module_idx, module_type, module_name, remark, link_url, link_param, auth_group_id, add_dttm, add_id, mod_dttm, mod_id FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = #{module_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(module_idx),0)+1 FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT
INSERT INTO WB_MODULE_MNGT ( module_idx, module_type, module_name, remark, link_url, link_param, auth_group_id, add_dttm, add_id, mod_dttm, mod_id ) VALUES ( #{module_idx}, #{module_type}, #{module_name}, #{remark}, #{link_url}, #{link_param}, #{auth_group_id}, SYSDATE, #{add_id}, SYSDATE, #{mod_id} )
mapper.update: UPDATE WB_MODULE_MNGT SET module_name = #{module_name}, remark = #{remark}, link_url = #{link_url}, link_param = #{link_param}, mod_dttm = SYSDATE, mod_id = #{mod_id} WHERE MODULE_IDX = #{module_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT module_idx, module_type, module_name, remark, link_url, link_param, auth_group_id, add_dttm, add_id, mod_dttm, mod_id FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE link_url = #{link_url}
